message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle note
skinparam actorStyle awesome
skinparam databaseStyle cylinder
skinparam arrowColor #000000
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E0E0E0
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantFontSize 14
skinparam participantFontStyle bold
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FF6666
skinparam noteBorderColor #000000
skinparam noteFontColor #000000
skinparam noteFontSize 12
skinparam noteFontStyle normal
skinparam actorBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam actorBorderColor #000000
skinparam actorFontColor #000000
skinparam actorFontSize 12
skinparam actorFontStyle normal
skinparam databaseBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam databaseBorderColor #000000
skinparam databaseFontColor #000000
skinparam databaseFontSize 12
skinparam databaseFontStyle normal

title create file, add, reset, delete

participant "GIT" as GIT {
    participant "Working dir" as WD #FF6666
    participant "Stage" as Stage #99FF99
    database "History" as History #E6E6FA
}

actor User

User -> WD: create file2
note right of WD: file2 created
WD -> Stage: git add file2
note right of Stage: file2 created
Stage -> WD: git [ reset | reset file2 | reset HEAD file2 ]
note right of WD: file2 created
WD --> User: delete file2

@enduml
